text: Phase-b nonsymmetric eigen in final hardening (review passed; 2 lock-in tests pending). Scope decision 2026-07-11: left eigenvectors DEFERRED out of phase-b (parity doc §2 marker updated; follow-up bead gale-left-eigenvectors) — Francis kernel computes right vectors only. Shared minor NIT flagged by review (applies to Lanczos, Arnoldi, and GKL alike): on partial convergence, diagnostics.residuals records converged units only, so requireConverged's DidNotConverge(worstResidual) payload understates the failure — consider recording failed-unit residuals when someone next touches the diagnostics plumbing; behavior matches the documented contract, so no bead yet.
